blended.narrative: Ragged Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,997 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
